scriptLines: source(output(id as string, current_age as string, gender as string, address as string)) ~> UsersDataSource
source(output(id as string, client_id as string, card_brand as string, card_type as string, credit_limit as string)) ~> CardsDataSource
source(output(id as string, date as string, client_id as string, card_id as string, amount as string, merchant_state as string, errors as string)) ~> TranscationDataSource
RemoveInvalidAge derive(gender = upper(gender), address = trim(address)) ~> StandardizeUsers
FilterCards derive(card_brand = upper(card_brand), card_type = upper(card_type), has_chip = iif(isNull(has_chip), 'False', has_chip)) ~> StandardizeCards
RemoveInvalidDates derive(errors = iif(isNull(errors), 'No Error', errors), merchant_state = iif(isNull(merchant_state), 'Online', merchant_state)) ~> derivedColumn
StandardizeUsers sink(format: 'parquet', skipDuplicateMapInputs: true, skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> SinkUsers
StandardizeCards sink(format: 'parquet', skipDuplicateMapInputs: true, skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> SinkCards
derivedColumn sink(format: 'parquet', skipDuplicateMapInputs: true, skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> SinkTransc
